    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    S

    scene - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.SceneDeviceState
    The scene this entry belongs to.
    Scene - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    A named collection of device target states that can be activated in one action (FR-17).
    Scene() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Scene
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    SceneDeviceState - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    The target state of one device within a scene (FR-17).
    SceneDeviceState() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.SceneDeviceState
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    SceneDeviceStateRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    The desired state for one device within a scene (FR-17).
    SceneDeviceStateRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneDeviceStateRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    SceneDeviceStateResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a single device-state entry within a scene.
    SceneDeviceStateResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    SceneMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Scene entities to response DTOs.
    SceneRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Scene entities.
    SceneRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.SceneRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    SceneRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for creating or updating a scene (FR-17).
    SceneRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    SceneResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for scene management and activation (FR-17).
    SceneResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    SceneResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a scene including all its device states.
    SceneResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    schedule - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    The schedule applied during the vacation period.
    Schedule - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    A time-based schedule that executes a fixed device action on a recurring pattern (FR-09).
    Schedule() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    scheduleId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    The schedule to apply during the vacation period (overrides normal schedules).
    scheduleId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Identifier of the schedule applied during vacation mode.
    ScheduleMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Schedule entities to response DTOs.
    scheduleName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Name of the schedule applied during vacation mode.
    ScheduleRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Schedule entities.
    ScheduleRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.ScheduleRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    ScheduleRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for creating or updating a time-based schedule (FR-09).
    ScheduleRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    ScheduleResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for time-based schedules (FR-09).
    ScheduleResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ScheduleResource
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    ScheduleResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a schedule.
    ScheduleResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.
    sendCommand(DeviceCommand) - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Sends a command to the target hardware.
    sendCommand(DeviceCommand) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    sendCommand(DeviceCommand) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
     
    SENSOR - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.DeviceType
    Sensor (e.g., motion, temperature).
    setLevel(Long, double) - Statische Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Creates a command that sets the device's analog level.
    simulateEvent(String, DeviceEvent) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
    Simulates an incoming event on the given topic for testing.
    source() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente source zurück.
    sourceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    ID of the first conflicting automation.
    sourceKind - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Kind of the first automation (e.g., "SCHEDULE" or "RULE").
    sourceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Name of the first conflicting automation.
    startDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    First day of the vacation period (inclusive).
    startDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    First day of the configured vacation period.
    startDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    First day of the vacation period (inclusive).
    StartupDataLoader - Klasse in at.jku.se
    Loads realistic sample data on every application startup.
    StartupDataLoader() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.StartupDataLoader
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    stateChange(String, Map) - Statische Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Factory for a STATE_CHANGE event stamped with the current time.
    subscribe(String, Consumer) - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Subscribes to events published on the given topic.
    subscribe(String, Consumer) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    subscribe(String, Consumer) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
     
    subscribeToDevice(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTIntegrationService
    Subscribes to hardware events for a specific device.
    SWITCH - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.DeviceType
    On/off switch.
    switchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceStateRequest
    Desired on/off state for SWITCH devices.
    switchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Whether the device is currently switched on (applies to SWITCH devices).
    switchedOn - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    Boolean state: on/off for SWITCH.
    switchOff(Long) - Statische Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Creates a command that switches the device off.
    switchOn(Long) - Statische Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Creates a command that switches the device on.
